claim: LangGraph checkpointers enable conversation memory by storing thread state, allowing agents to recall previous interactions without reloading context
actionable: Use LangGraph's memory checkpoint for multi-turn conversations; choose memory or Redis checkpointers based on persistence needs
source_title: Build a Streaming LangChain Agent in Next.js with useStream

claim: useStream hook from LangGraph SDK streams typed agent messages to React UI without parsing text, enabling type-safe agent interfaces
actionable: Use useStream hook in React apps to display agent messages, tool calls, and state directly with full type safety
source_title: Build a Streaming LangChain Agent in Next.js with useStream

claim: Recursion limits in agent streams prevent endless loops of tool calls or reasoning by capping iteration depth
actionable: Always set recursion_limit in agent stream config to prevent infinite loops; monitor for this failure pattern in production
source_title: Build a Streaming LangChain Agent in Next.js with useStream
